ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, landmark) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location data was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the location data */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the location has been verified by an admin */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who verified the location */,
  "verified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was verified */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the popularity of the location based on user engagement */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES location_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the author (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the author's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author account was last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the location type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., IN for India) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location tag */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that is tagged */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location tagged in the post */,
  "tagged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was tagged with the location */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the location tag has been verified by an admin */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who verified the location tag */,
  "verified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location tag was verified */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the engagement of the post with the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_tags_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the engagement of the post */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the post content */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location when the post was made */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the post is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location update */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the update */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who approved the update */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejecting the update, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_updates_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_updates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
